linkedin.last_post_summary: Reported on a 3-day ICRISAT review program regarding 'AI-powered Agro-met Advisories at Scale', highlighting multi-institutional collaboration under Mission Mausam.

data.recent_activity_summary: Ram Madhav is actively focused on technical AI and backend development, specifically maintaining GitHub repositories for projects like the WhatsApp AI Assistant and RAG-based document systems. He recently shared updates regarding collaborative efforts at ICRISAT on AI-enabled agricultural advisory services.
data.data_confidence_rationale: Data is consistent across LinkedIn and GitHub, though direct posting activity on social platforms is sparse. LinkedIn data was partially limited by platform access.
